default.label: Email address
default.hint: We will never share your email with anyone.

long_label.label: Please enter your full legal name as it appears on your government-issued identification document

long_error.label: Password
long_error.error: Password must be at least 12 characters, include one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character.

long_hint.label: Bio
long_hint.hint: Tell us about yourself. This will be displayed on your public profile and visible to all users. Keep it concise but informative.

both_hint_and_error.label: Email
both_hint_and_error.hint: This hint is hidden when error is present.
